_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze, modify, develop, debug, and document software and applications utilizing standard, non-standard, specialized, and/or unique communication protocols.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.499), OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.497).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.516). Shared vocabulary: [develop, standard]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, applications, communication, debug, document, modify] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, data, documentation, escalation, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.856, R=0.850). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Analyze, modify, develop, debug, and document software and applications utilizin" and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.532 ≈ STS 0.516 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [develop, standard] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [develop, standard]. DCWF-only: [analyze, applications, communication, debug, document, modify]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, data, documentation, escalation, knowledge].
